Hero.description: Maritime officer, bestselling author, and mentor — navigating the offshore industry and inspiring the next generation of women at sea.

Story.paragraph1: Neslihan Müfreze made history as Turkey's first female offshore Unlimited Dynamic Positioning Operator. Starting as a high school student dreaming of the open sea, she navigated a career path that few women had walked before — earning her unlimited DPO certification and proving that the open sea recognizes skill, not gender.
Story.paragraph2: Today, she shares over fifteen years of offshore experience through her bestselling books, a thriving social media presence reaching more than 72,000 followers, and one-on-one mentorship for aspiring maritime professionals. Her mission: to chart a clearer course for the next generation of women at sea.

Consulting.heading: Navigate Your Maritime Career
Consulting.description: Book a one-on-one session with Turkey's first female offshore Unlimited DPO. Get the guidance you need to advance your career at sea.
Consulting.tier1Description: A focused session to answer your most pressing questions about offshore careers, DP certification, or maritime pathways.
Consulting.tier2Description: Deep dive into your career goals with a personalized roadmap for advancing in the offshore maritime industry.
Consulting.tier3Description: Ongoing mentorship over three sessions to build your confidence, refine your strategy, and track your progress.

Testimonials.heading: What People Say
Testimonials.quote1: Neslihan's mentorship completely changed my perspective on what's possible in the offshore industry. Her guidance on DP certification saved me months of wrong turns. I went from feeling lost to landing my first DP Operator role within a year.
Testimonials.quote2: Her book 'Kaptanlığa Giden Yol' was the first time I saw my own dreams reflected in someone else's story. As a woman entering maritime, having a role model like Neslihan — who's actually done it at the highest level — is invaluable.
Testimonials.quote3: I've worked with many consultants, but Neslihan's hands-on offshore experience sets her apart. She doesn't just give theoretical advice — she knows exactly what it takes to succeed on the bridge of an offshore vessel.

Footer.description: Turkey's first female offshore Unlimited DPO. Author, maritime professional, and consultant sharing her journey through books and mentorship.
Footer.tagline: Designed with care for the maritime community.

Book1.metaTitle: Kaptanlığa Giden Yol — Turkish Maritime Career Guide
Book1.metaDescription: A comprehensive guide to shape your maritime career, from Turkey's first female offshore Unlimited DPO Neslihan Müfreze. 10 chapters, ~180 pages.
Book1.title: Kaptanlığa Giden Yol
Book1.tagline: A comprehensive guide from Turkey's first female offshore Unlimited DPO to shape your maritime career.
Book1.tocDescription: Across 10 chapters, you'll find the knowledge and strategies you need at every stage of your career, from entering the maritime profession to offshore captaincy.
Book1.ch3: Path to Becoming a Deck Officer
Book1.authorCredentials: Unlimited Ocean-Going Captain · Unlimited DPO · Author
Book1.authorBio: As Turkey's first female offshore Unlimited Dynamic Positioning Operator, Neslihan Müfreze has served in the world's most challenging waters from the North Sea to West Africa with over 10 years of maritime experience. She inspires the next generation of mariners by sharing her passion and knowledge of the sea.
Book1.review1Quote: This book became the most important resource shaping my maritime career. Neslihan's experiences and practical advice saved me months during my DP certification process.
Book1.review2Quote: As a woman wanting to enter maritime, I found myself in every line of this book. Neslihan's story is inspiring and her guide is extremely practical.
Book1.review3Quote: Every mariner wanting to transition to the offshore sector should read this book. The certification processes and career map are explained very clearly.
Book1.review4Quote: It fills a major gap in Turkish maritime literature. The STCW standards and DP certification chapters are particularly enlightening.
Book1.faq1Q: What format is the book available in?
Book1.faq1A: The book is currently available in digital (PDF) format. You can start reading immediately after purchase. A print version is in progress.
Book1.faq2Q: What level of mariners is this book aimed at?
Book1.faq2A: The book appeals to a wide audience, from those just starting a maritime career to experienced officers. Early chapters cover entering the profession, while advanced chapters cover specialization areas like offshore and DP.
Book1.faq3Q: How will I receive the book after payment?
Book1.faq3A: After payment is completed, the book link will automatically be sent to your email address. You can also download it from the post-payment redirect page.
Book1.faq4A: As a digital product, refunds are not available. However, if you experience any issues with the book, our support team will assist you.
Book1.faq5A: Yes! You can reach Neslihan Müfreze through the contact section on the homepage or via social media accounts. One-on-one consulting services are also available.
Book1.ctaSubtitle: Everything you need on the path to captaincy is in this book. Get started now.

Book1Success.confirmation: Your purchase of Kaptanlığa Giden Yol is confirmed. Check your email for the download link and order details.

Book2.metaTitle: Offshore Life — Bilingual Guide to Life at Sea
Book2.metaDescription: A bilingual (English & Türkçe) guide to offshore life — from your first hitch to DP operations, safety culture, and thriving on rotation. ~150 pages, €24.
Book2.title: Offshore Life
Book2.subtitle: Açık Deniz Hayatı
Book2.description: A bilingual guide to life at sea — from your first hitch to DP operations, safety culture, and thriving on rotation. Written in English & Türkçe for the global maritime community.
Book2.ch1Desc: What draws people to life at sea — the freedom, the pay, the adventure — and the realities nobody tells you about upfront.
Book2.ch2Desc: Surviving the first crew change: what to pack, what to expect, and how to earn respect from day one on board.
Book2.ch3Desc: Hour-by-hour breakdown of life on a drillship — from the 0600 toolbox talk to the midnight watch handover.
Book2.ch4Desc: Dynamic positioning demystified — how the system works, what the operator does, and the mindset of staying on station.
Book2.ch5Desc: Why safety isn't just a slogan offshore. Real stories of near-misses and the habits that keep crews alive.
Book2.ch6Desc: Reading weather windows, understanding significant wave height, and making go/no-go decisions in tough conditions.
Book2.ch7Desc: Living and working with strangers in tight quarters — communication, conflict resolution, and building trust fast.
Book2.ch8Desc: Managing relationships, finances, and mental health across the equal-time rotation cycle — on and off the vessel.
Book2.ch9Desc: From cadet to master mariner — certifications, endorsements, and strategic moves to advance your offshore career.
Book2.ch10Desc: Green shipping, autonomous vessels, and new energy — how the industry is changing and where the opportunities lie.
Book2.authorCredentials: Captain · Unlimited DPO · Author · Maritime Mentor
Book2.authorBio: Currently serving on drillships worldwide, Neslihan Müfreze is one of the very few women holding an Unlimited Dynamic Positioning Operator certificate. With over a decade of hands-on DP operations experience — from the North Sea to West Africa — she brings the realities of offshore life to the page with authenticity and warmth. Her mission: to share what life at sea is truly like and inspire the next generation of mariners through writing.
Book2.review1Quote: This book captures the offshore experience like nothing else I've read. Whether you're a cadet preparing for your first hitch or a seasoned mariner reflecting on the life, Neslihan's writing brings the drillship to life. The bilingual format is a brilliant touch.
Book2.review2Quote: I wish I'd had this book before my first rotation. The chapter on crew dynamics alone would have saved me weeks of awkward adjustment. Practical, honest, and full of the kind of advice that only comes from real experience at sea.
Book2.review3Quote: As a maritime academy instructor, I've added this to my recommended reading list. The bilingual approach helps my Turkish students build technical English confidence while learning from a genuine role model in the field.
Book2.review4Quote: Neslihan doesn't romanticize offshore life — she tells it straight, with warmth and humour. The DP operations chapter is the clearest explanation I've ever read. This is essential reading for anyone considering a career at sea.
Book2.faq1Q: What level of experience is this book aimed at?
Book2.faq1A: Offshore Life is written for everyone — from cadets and maritime students exploring the industry to experienced officers who want a fresh perspective. The early chapters cover the basics, while later chapters dive into advanced topics like DP operations and career strategy.
Book2.faq2A: Each chapter is presented in both English and Türkçe, side by side. This helps Turkish readers build technical maritime English vocabulary while reading in their native language, and also makes the book accessible to a wider international audience.
Book2.faq3Q: I'm not a deck officer — is this book still relevant for me?
Book2.faq3A: Absolutely. While the author's background is in deck and DP operations, the majority of the book covers universal offshore topics: safety culture, crew dynamics, rotation life, weather awareness, and career development. Engineers, ETOs, and catering staff will all find value here.
Book2.faq4Q: How do I purchase and receive the book?
Book2.faq4A: Click 'Buy Now' to proceed to our secure Stripe checkout. After payment, you'll receive an email with a download link for the digital edition. If you ordered a physical copy, it will be shipped within 3–5 business days to your address.
Book2.faq5Q: Can I buy this as a gift for someone starting their offshore career?
Book2.faq5A: Yes! During checkout you can enter a different email address for delivery of the digital edition. For physical copies, simply use the recipient's shipping address. It's a perfect gift for cadets, new graduates, or anyone curious about life at sea.
Book2.ctaSubtitle: Discover what life at sea is really like — the watches, the weather, the crew, and the career. Written by someone who lives it every day.

Book2Success.confirmation: Your purchase of Offshore Life is confirmed. Check your email for the download link and order details.
